title: Blocking remote account never sends Block activity
description: In interactions.rs, the block() handler for a remote account (line 592) inserts into the local blocks table and removes follow/follower relationships locally, but never enqueues a Block activity to the remote server's inbox. The remote server is never informed of the block, so from its perspective the relationship is unchanged — the remote user still appears to follow the local account and can continue to interact. Per ActivityPub spec, a Block activity should be sent to the remote actor's inbox so the remote server can clean up its state. Compare with the unfollow handler which correctly sends an Undo{Follow}.
